dev.jeka.core.api.system

Class JkNumberLogDecorator

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkLog.JkLogDecorator
      • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkNumberLogDecorator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public final class JkNumberLogDecorator
extends JkLog.JkLogDecorator
    This decorator adds task numbering s: 1 s: 1.1 s: 1.1.1 e: s: 1.1.2
    See Also:

        Description copied from class: JkLog.JkLogDecorator
        This method is invoked by JkLog when a new consumer is applied on. JkLog provides the 2 PrintStream for outputting decorated log events
